prompt: A refined new tab wallpaper inspired by retro linocut topographic art: mostly warm white negative space, a sparse cluster of psychedelic geological contour lines and terraced strata flowing along the lower-left edge, coarse ink texture, subtle vintage print grain, elegant and quiet.
style: Retro Linocut Topographic Art / Psychedelic Strata, redesigned as a minimal UI background with generous white space and restrained decorative density.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 70-80% of the canvas clean warm white. Place the artwork low and toward the left edge, leaving the center and upper area open for newtab UI.
lighting: Soft paper-white brightness, gentle print contrast, calm editorial mood.
palette: warm white, ivory, pale ochre, muted terracotta, charcoal black used sparingly
materials: matte paper texture, linocut ink grain, subtle screenprint imperfections
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Must feel like a quiet UI wallpaper, not a busy poster. Keep the center readable and uncluttered.
negative: dense full-frame pattern, dark background, saturated orange covering the canvas, readable typography, photorealism, glossy 3D

prompt: A minimalist artistic new tab wallpaper inspired by vintage grainy risograph and steampunk collage: mostly white paper background, a few muted mechanical collage fragments and halftone textures drifting near the right edge, nostalgic but airy, sophisticated and low-contrast.
style: Vintage Grainy Risograph / Steampunk Collage adapted for a clean UI wallpaper, paper collage texture with very sparse surreal mechanical elements.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75% clean white or off-white space. Put the collage fragments on the far right and lower-right, with open center for UI content.
lighting: Soft paper daylight, muted printed contrast, nostalgic but calm.
palette: white paper, soft gray, muted teal, dusty rust, faded yellow, light black ink
materials: risograph grain, halftone dots, paper fibers, torn collage edges, light film grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep it airy, elegant, and not distracting behind UI controls.
negative: busy collage, high contrast black masses, dark paper, neon colors, readable typography, sharp UI mockups

prompt: A modern Chinese ink shanshui new tab wallpaper: expansive white rice-paper space, delicate black ink line art of misty mountains, terraced fields, and a small ancient pavilion along the bottom margin, sparse olive and beige washes, poetic and refined.
style: Modern Chinese Ink Shanshui / Vintage Line Art Illustration transformed into a minimal white UI background with delicate linework and broad empty paper space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Preserve 75-85% open white rice-paper space. Landscape elements sit lightly along the bottom and lower-left, leaving the central area clean for Lumno newtab UI.
lighting: Soft misty paper brightness, calm classical atmosphere.
palette: rice-paper white, beige, pale stone green, olive gray, light ochre, fine black ink
materials: rice paper fiber, fine ink outlines, faint watercolor wash, vintage line-art grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep linework delicate, elegant, and low-density. Center must stay clean and readable.
negative: crowded mountain scene, dark ink wash across the whole canvas, saturated fantasy colors, anime character, glossy 3D, readable typography

prompt: A surreal 3D architectural minimalism new tab wallpaper: mostly white space with a very pale cyan-blue atmosphere, a small cluster of textured stone monoliths emerging from calm water near the lower-right edge, soft moonlike disk, quiet liminal elegance.
style: 3D Architectural Minimalism / Monochromatic Surrealism, converted into a bright white and pale-cyan UI background with minimal sculptural forms.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 70-80% bright white or very pale cyan negative space. Place the sculpture and water reflection low and to the right, with open center for UI.
lighting: Soft cool ambient light, pale moonlit glow, tranquil and spacious.
palette: white, very pale cyan, soft blue-gray, light stone, minimal deeper blue accents
materials: matte textured stone, calm water reflection, subtle atmospheric haze, clean 3D render
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep it minimal, airy, and suitable behind newtab UI.
negative: dark blue full-frame scene, heavy shadows, clutter, people, city, vegetation, cartoon style, readable typography
